code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_RedisCache] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [Infra_RedisCache]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [Infra_RedisCache]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (Infra_LoadBalancer)
        - Area (Infra_RedisCache)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Redis缓存基础设施团队设计一个工单生命周期状态图。起点应该是Infra_RedisCache，工单创建后进入Opened状态。
明白了。Opened之后需要经过Triage阶段吗？我看到很多团队会加一个自动化的分流环节。
对，Opened到Triage是自动触发，标注为"Auto-added to project"。Triage之后要能走到Todo、Closed，或者NeedsInfo三个方向。
好的，我先把主干画出来：Opened→Triage，然后Triage分出Accepted到Todo、Rejected到Closed、以及More information needed到NeedsInfo。NeedsInfo还要能回到Triage或者走向Closed。
Todo之后进入InProgress，这里要体现实际开发工作。InProgress要能走到InReview、Blocked，或者退回到Todo。Blocked状态需要支持Unblocked回到InProgress，或者Alternative approach回到Todo。
InReview之后的流转呢？PR merged应该到Done，Changes requested要回到InProgress？
没错。Done和Closed最终都要回到Infra_RedisCache作为闭环。另外每个状态右侧需要加note说明具体工作内容，比如Opened要标注Labels applied包括Type和Area。
完成了。Triage的note写了Platform/Owner reviews三个问题，Todo的note包含Priority P0-P3和Effort XS-XL的标注，InProgress和InReview也按你要求补充了Active development和PR review的具体说明。
Opened的note里Area应该是Infra_RedisCache，不是Infra_LoadBalancer，Type才是Infra_LoadBalancer。这个标签组合要准确。
已修正。Opened的Labels applied：Type对应Infra_LoadBalancer，Area对应Infra_RedisCache。整个状态图从创建到关闭的完整生命周期都涵盖了。
